{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Leaf Award
|class_id=20135
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The trophy awarded for the highest prize of the Cennes International Film Festival is a Golden Leaf Award. The crystal trophy base weighs 1 kilogram, and the olive branch and the leaves are made of gold. With a total weight of 118 grams, it is worth tens of thousands of euros.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=12
|civ=29
|tech=16
|ss1=Finish All Daily Tasks 7 times, Snail RUSH +1<br>All Daily Tasks Completed: 364/364
|ss2=Finish All Daily Tasks 7 times, Snail RUSH +2<br>All Daily Tasks Completed: 364/364
|ss3=Finish All Daily Tasks 7 times, Snail RUSH +3<br>All Daily Tasks Completed: 364/364
|ss4=Finish All Daily Tasks 7 times, Snail RUSH +3<br>All Daily Tasks Completed: 364/364
|ss7=Finish All Daily Tasks 7 times, Snail RUSH +3<br>All Daily Tasks Completed: 364/364<br> (Awakened)
}}
